questions.question: A solid metallic sphere of radius 14 cm is melted and drawn into 196 smaller spheres. Find the radius of each smaller sphere.
questions.answer: Volume large sphere=4/3 ПЂ14Вів‰€11494.08; Volume small sphere=11494.08/196в‰€58.6; Radius=в€›(58.6Г—3/4ПЂ)в‰€2.43 cm
answer_outline: Divide by number of small spheres

questions.question: A solid cone of height 24 cm and base radius 14 cm is cut into two parts by a plane parallel to base such that volume of smaller cone is 1/27 of original. Find height of smaller cone.
questions.answer: Volume ratio=(h1/h)Ві=1/27 в‡’ h1/h=1/3 в‡’ h1=24/3=8 cm
answer_outline: Use volume ratio formula for similar cones

questions.question: A solid sphere of radius 14 cm is hollowed to form a spherical shell with inner radius 7 cm. Find total surface area of shell.
questions.answer: SA shell=4ПЂRВІ+4ПЂrВІ=4ПЂ(196+49)=4Г—3.14Г—245в‰€3075.2 cmВІ

questions.question: A metallic sphere of radius 21 cm is melted into cylindrical rods of radius 7 cm and height 21 cm. Find number of rods formed.

questions.question: A solid cone of height 24 cm and radius 14 cm is cut by a plane parallel to base such that upper part volume is 1/8 of total. Find height of smaller cone.
